description: A comparison expression used for prerequisite (m_PremCompExp1/2) and finish-condition (m_FinCompExp1/2) checks. Each side is a string expression (parsed at runtime) plus a compiled expression array. The strings are stored as abase::vector<char> whose _cur_size field drives the variable-section read.

fields.name: _cur_size
fields.description: KEY: element count written by SaveFixedDataToBinFile. Read by PHP parser to know how many bytes follow in the variable section.

fields.name: strExpLeft
fields.description: Left-side expression string vector. _cur_size at offset +12 gives the byte count of the string that follows in the variable section.

fields.name: arrExpLeft
fields.description: Compiled expression array for left side. TASK_EXPRESSION = int(4)+float(4) = 8 bytes. _cur_size at offset +12 gives element count.

fields.name: strExpRight
fields.description: Right-side expression string vector. _cur_size at offset +12 gives the byte count.

fields.name: arrExpRight
fields.description: Compiled expression array for right side.

variable_section_sequence: if m_bPremNeedComp (fixed@1645): strExpLeft bytes (n1 = fixed@1662), strExpRight bytes (n2 = fixed@1698), strExpLeft bytes (n3 = fixed@1730), strExpRight bytes (n4 = fixed@1766)
if m_bFinNeedComp (fixed@2277):  strExpLeft bytes (n1 = fixed@2294), strExpRight bytes (n2 = fixed@2330), strExpLeft bytes (n3 = fixed@2362), strExpRight bytes (n4 = fixed@2398)
